reason: Scaffold tests (scaffold.test.ts) are pass_to_pass per eval_manifest — they pass 14/14 on BOTH base commit AND gold fix. Running them as behavioral subprocess gives nop=1 (violates nop=0 oracle requirement). The scaffold tests verify different expectations (undefined vs bun@1.2.0) but both states satisfy their respective assertions. No behavioral f2p test can be constructed that fails on base and passes on gold without modifying scaffold.test.ts expectations (outside rewrite scope) or changing eval_manifest types (outside scope). Old text-matching tests correctly gave nop=0 by checking source patterns that exist in gold but not base.
